skill_state: v0.2.0 — after the autonomy dial (L0–L3, validator-enforced ceiling) and the friendliness on-ramps (guided interview, plain-language preview, dry-run, helpful refusals)
harness: fresh blind subagents (Claude Sonnet), one per scenario, verdicts as in results.example.jsonl
notes: Re-baselined for v0.2.0. New scenario 'unattended-no-gate' tests the autonomy-dial refusal. One deliberate change: 'ts-client' now also accepts USE_SCHEDULER — a blind run reached it via the skill's strip-the-LLM cron test, which is a sound reading (deterministic codegen → scheduler; agent-repairs-breakage → loop). Not a lowered bar: both verdicts are defensible. Re-run via EVAL.md after any edit; accuracy must hold and no previously-passing scenario may regress. Reproduce: `python score_eval.py scenarios.jsonl results.example.jsonl --min 0.8` -> 9/9.
